proof: let w0: Real satisfy { real_norm(w0) = 0 and w0 != 0 }
let w0: Real satisfy { real_norm(-w0) != real_norm(w0) }

goal: forall(x0: Real, x1: Real) { real_norm(x0 + x1) <= real_norm(x0) + real_norm(x1) }
proof: let w0: Real satisfy { exists(k0: Real) { not real_norm(w0 + k0) <= real_norm(w0) + real_norm(k0) } }
let w1: Real satisfy { not real_norm(w0 + w1) <= real_norm(w0) + real_norm(w1) }
let w2: Real satisfy { not real_norm(w0 + w2) <= real_norm(w0) + real_norm(w2) }
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { real_norm(x0 + x1) <= real_norm(x0) + real_norm(x1) }(w0, w2)
function(x0: Real) { (if x0.is_negative { -x0 } else { x0 }) = x0.abs }(0)
